notFound.description: Wygląda na to, że link kierujący tutaj był nieprawidłowy.

email.heading: Każda aktualizacja projektu — bezpośrednio do Twojej skrzynki odbiorczej.
email.subheading: Spodziewaj się wiadomości e-mail raz w miesiącu.
email.submitSuccessConfirm: Dzięki! Sprawdź skrzynkę odbiorczą, aby potwierdzić subskrypcję.
email.joinCommunity: Dołącz do <button>{appName} {featureCommunity}</button> i poznaj dynamiczną społeczność budującą, obsługującą i używającą Session.

about.title: Czym jest {appName}?
about.content: {appName} to komunikator z szyfrowaniem end-to-end, który chroni Twoje dane osobowe. Odzyskaj kontrolę dzięki aplikacji stworzonej, zaprojektowanej i prowadzonej przez globalną społeczność ekspertów ds. prywatności.

1.heading: Bez numerów telefonów
1.content:
Chroń swoją tożsamość dzięki {featureAccountIds}.

Do rejestracji nie jest wymagany numer telefonu ani adres e-mail.

2.heading: Bez wycieków danych
2.content:
{appName} nie gromadzi danych,

więc nie ma co wyciekać.

3.heading: Bezpieczne ścieżki
3.content:
Ścieżki oparte na technologii onion chronią Twoje rozmowy

przed hakerami i podsłuchiwaczami.

4.heading: Open Source
4.content:
{appName} nie ma nic do ukrycia. Każdy może

przeglądać, sprawdzać i współtworzyć jego kod.

5.heading: Siła społeczności
5.content:
Tysiące {featureNodes} obsługiwanych przez globalną społeczność.

{appName} należy do ludzi i jest dla ludzi.

6.heading: Brak trackerów
6.content:
Twoje dane nigdy nie są zbierane, śledzone

ani sprzedawane osobom trzecim.

features.title: Funkcje
features.heading: Ciesz się funkcjami, które lubisz, i bezpieczeństwem, na które zasługujesz.

1.heading: Rozmawiaj swobodnie
1.content: Tylko Ty i osoba, z którą rozmawiasz, możecie zobaczyć swoje wiadomości. Ciesz się poczuciem wolności dzięki szyfrowaniu end-to-end i znikającym wiadomościom.

2.heading: Zachowaj kontrolę
2.content: Masz pełną kontrolę nad swoimi wiadomościami od początku do końca. Niezależnie od tego, czy jest to zarządzanie własnymi kluczami szyfrowania, czy wybór własnego motywu — Session daje Ci pełną kontrolę.

3.heading: Bądź na bieżąco ze swoimi znajomymi
3.content: Niezależnie od tego, czy nadrabiasz zaległości z bliskimi znajomymi, czy organizujesz duże wydarzenie, z bezpiecznymi czatami typu {featureGroup} oraz {featureCommunity} (100+ członków) jest to czysta przyjemność.

redirect.heading: Przekierowywanie...
redirect.content: Kliknij <button>tutaj</button>, aby wrócić do poprzedniej strony.

donate.title: Donate | Support Privacy Technology
donate.description: The {foundationName} cannot continue without your support. Donate today to help {appName} in its fight for survival.

donate.heading: {appName} needs your help
donate.heroContent:
Private messaging is an essential part of our modern life. Secure communication shelters people from tyranny, protects those fighting against injustice, and empowers defenders of human rights worldwide.



However, the well-resourced opponents of privacy are actively working to suppress the tech that guards people's basic human rights and dignities. Politicians around the world are pushing for encryption-busting laws, privacy tech is slandered in the media, and surveillance capitalists are profiting from the chaos. Despite the adversity, {appName} continues to provide a safe, secure, and trusted space for people to communicate online. {appName} is a free, private, and secure messaging app. It does not track users or sell your data—it just sends messages, privately. Millions of people around the world have turned to Session when they needed a safe and secure place to have a conversation.



More than just a tool, {appName} is a symbol of the importance of open-source, transparent, and resilient technology. It is technology like {appName} which safeguards our basic human rights in an era of increasing uncertainty and authoritarianism.

1.heading: A force for good
1.content: Technology is transforming our society. Currently, a tiny cohort of powerful individuals and institutions have disproportionate control over the internet. In many cases, tech is being used to silence, manipulate, and suppress. It's time to push back against these forces of power.<image></image>We are agents of change in a world where technology is a tool for upending oppression. We believe in a future where technology is collaborative, transparent, equitable, and liberating.

2.heading: Meet your privacy defenders
2.content:
{appName} is stewarded by the {foundationName}, a Swiss foundation dedicated to maintaining the open-source {appName} ecosystem. We are a team of technologists, engineers, and activists dedicated to the mission of restoring online privacy. The financial independence of the {foundationName} allows us to fearlessly build the privacy technology that protects everyone's human rights. Your support will contribute to new {appName} development, fund essential network infrastructure, and the ongoing fight for freedom and privacy rights.



We currently accept donations via credit card and cryptocurrency. A cryptocurrency donation address is available for {ethNetworkName} and other EVM-compatible tokens, such as {usdcSymbol}.

3.heading: Thank you for caring
3.content:
The {foundationName} is a Swiss-registered foundation. We are a non-profit oriented organization, subject to audits from the {swissSupervisory}. Our work helps protect privacy for all and shield those most at risk.We currently accept donations via credit card and cryptocurrency. A cryptocurrency donation address is available for {ethNetworkName} and other EVM-compatible tokens, such as {usdcSymbol}.



Note that donations are not tax-deductible. If you have queries about donations or gifts, contact us via email:



Please verify the URL is before sending funds. If needed, addresses can be authenticated via email.

5.heading: Donate via Crypto
5.content: You can send {ethSymbol}, {usdcSymbol}, {usdtSymbol} or {btcSymbol} to the following {foundationName} addresses.

donate.heroAppeal:
Eight years ago, {appName} was founded with a mission to restore your privacy and give you control over your speech and life — in essence, digital freedom. However, without your help today, we won’t be able to continue developing {appName} for much longer. If you’ve ever found value in {appName} or its mission, please give me a moment of your time and read this appeal.



{appName} is controversial technology in a time when free speech is not a given, the right to privacy is abhorred, and the truth is a lie. Over the years, the organisations safeguarding {appName} have faced many challenges, but now {appNamePossessive} very survival is at risk.



The threats against privacy are now greater than ever before, and {appName} must evolve to face the challenges of the future. {appNamePossessive} current caretaker, the {foundationName}, does not have the funding required to carry {appName} any further. Important work, such as PFS and post-quantum cryptography, is still in progress — and we don’t have enough time left.



Our mission is to bring back the freedom, creativity, and privacy that people once felt when communicating online. We’ve planted a seed for a truly free messenger that removes the censors, the surveillers, and the centralized entities that monitor your conversations. So far, that idea has worked. Every month, over {appUserNumber} people use {appName} to send messages, not metadata.



{appName} is a platform that is built and owned by its community — not by big tech, private equity, or any other shadowy masters. Now, {appName} is turning to you.



The project is on a path to self-sustainability, but the future is fragile. If every {appName} user contributed just one dollar, it would go a long way towards {appName} reaching sustainability. If you've ever considered donating, now is the time to act.



{donateSignerName}

1.question: How can I donate to {appName}?
1.answer:
There are currently two ways to support the continued development of {appName}:



Donorbox



{donationProviderName} is a third-party platform that helps non-profit organizations accept donations through a variety of payment methods. You can donate to the {foundationName} via {donationProviderName} here.



Supported payment methods include:Cryptocurrency



You can also donate cryptocurrency directly to the {foundationName} by sending funds to the wallet addresses listed below.



{wordBitcoinAddress}: {addressBitcoin}



{wordEthereumAddress}: {addressEthereum}



This {wordEthereumAddress} accepts donations in {ethSymbol}, as well as {wordErc20} {wordTokens} (such as {usdtSymbol} and {usdcSymbol}) across {wordEvmCompatible} chains, like {ethNetworkName}, {arbNetworkName}, and {baseNetworkName}.



Note: If you are considering providing a donation of more than {largeDonationAmount} using any payment method, please contact us at

2.question: What will my donation be used for?
2.answer: Your donation will be received by the <foundation-link>{foundationName}</foundation-link>, a Swiss-based foundation which is the current steward of the {appName} application and project. Your donation will be used to support the ongoing development and sustainability of {appName}.

3.question: What is the {foundationName}?
3.answer: The {foundationName} ({foundationAcronym}) is a Swiss-based foundation and the steward of the {appName} application and project. You can learn more about the foundation’s role within the {appName} ecosystem <foundation-link>here</foundation-link>.

4.question: Are there any other ways I can help {appName}?
4.answer:
Donations are the primary way you can help support {appName} currently. However, if you’re unable to donate, there are several other ways you can help:
  1. Share this appeal with friends and family who use {appName} and may be interested in supporting our mission.
  2. Help translate {appName} into other languages via {wordCrowdin}
  3. Contribute to {appNamePossessive} open source codebase
